title: Cobblemon Add-on: Mega Showdown Ores
description: Adds a handful of Ores that help with crafting things related to Cobblemon and Mega Showdown!
body:
Join the Discord! I post updated on projects there =w=
https://discord.gg/AjC7P8TvgS

Need an afordable Minecraft Server? Kinetic Hosting's got some pretty good deals!
[![Partner](https://i.imgur.com/Nzbs37x.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=1399)

MSD Ores is an add-on that adds Multiple Blocks, Ores, Items, and Recipes to the Game, primarily to help reduce the grind of getting multiple Mega Stones, Wishing Stars, Z-Crystals, and also Fossils!



# **Some of the Recipes! (not all though, use a mod like JEI, EMI, etc.)**

![Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1590354e1383324e1df8c014fe2042f8945a1060.png)

Ignore the fact a lot of the textures are outdated
You can also use the Mega Shards, Max Meteor Shards, and Z-ium Fragments as Armor Trim Materials!

# **Mega Shards**

Spawns in Stone, Deepslate, and Mega Meteoroid Blocks

![Mega](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5be96eeb23908ea80723b40fc62fc61f57cd850_0.webp)

# **Dynite (1.2.0+) | Max Meteor Shards (Pre-1.2.0)**

Spawns in Stone and Deepslate

![Dynite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a318eb14b9521a0b7eaec5f34639c4437758551_0.webp)

# **Z-ium Fragments**

Spawns in Stone and Deepslate

![Zium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d9110969db76679d5daf0c27fd7afcb77261b47_0.webp)

# **Fossil Remains (1.2.0+) | Fossil Fragments (Pre-1.2.0)**

Spawns in Dirt, Sand, Red Sand, and Soul Sand

![Fossil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abf71e3fd3533481e71cb481694a5f555247aed3_0.webp)

# **Tera Storage Blocks (1.2.0+)**

They may have a use in a later update (don't hold your breath), for now they're just nice looking imo :3

![Tera](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c78ebf2fa24164f30efd0e3cba2f8583376e8b46_0.webp)


# **Compats:**

- Navas' ZAmega (Recipes) (Neoforge & Fabric)
- Actually Additions (Recipes) (Neoforge)
- Create (Recipes) (Neoforge)
- Mekanism( Recipes) (Neoforge)
- Powah (Recipes) (Neoforge)
- Oritech (Recipes) (Neoforge)
- Cobblemon Flawless Fossils (Recipes) (Neoforge)
- Productive Bees (Custom Bees) (Neoforge)
- Twilight Forest (Orespawning) (Neoforge)
- Tropicraft (Orespawning) (Neoforge)
- Deeper & Darker (Ores & Orespawning, Images coming eventually) (Neoforge)
- Aether (Ores & Orespawning) (Neoforge)
  
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Aether](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b3c267eb21d8e9d9ee4a838d851490b3bbab345_0.webp)

</details>

- The Undergarden (Ores & Orespawning) (Neoforge)
  
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Undergarden](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b082f16af48fbdceb24deb1b298fc4d51e446151_0.webp)

</details>


# **Extra Compats:**
These couldn't be intergrated into the base mod so they have external files you can download!
https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/13R1Km-zTAx2UQyqqCVyzf9SRFpBSC4dD?usp=sharing
- Potions Master Compat (OreSight potions) (Neoforge)
- Mystical Agriculture Compat (Essences, Crops, & Recipes) (Neoforge)


# **Future Plans:**
- Gravelmon Compat (when they finish the update to support cobblemon 1.7)
- More Fabric Supports
